title: Extend out of range Select
body:
For #5159.

The issue is that the signal only gets extended to the width of the result, but that width does not encompass the MSB. That is, `reg [11:0] a` extended to 30 bits due to `a[31:1]` (warning SELRANGE "Extracting 30 bits from only 10 bit number") still does not have a bit 31, so Dfg sees a select of 30 bits ([31:1]) from a 30 bit signal, but not from LSB 0, which is a malformed DfgSel.

I'm a bit fearful of changing V3Width but here is an attempt. Unforunately it creates some spurious extra warnings so this is not quite right. (This extension business in V3Width is a bit murky to me and even with a fix like this it will still likely produce weird results if the packed dimension have a negative LSB index.) 

Alternative is to treat the malformed input Ast as Dfg Incompatible and don't convert it to Dfg.
